languages.text: {n}Ваши слова имеют обратный эффект — его аугментированные связки дрожат, когда он произносит:{/n} "Не смейте указывать мне, что делать. Ваш Лорд-капитан потребовал объяснений".
{n}Your words have the opposite effect. His augmented joints tremble as he speaks,{/n} "Do not presume to tell me what to do. Your Lord Captain demanded an explanation."
languages.original_text: {n}Ваши слова имеют обратный эффект — его аугментированные связки дрожат, когда он произносит:{/n} "Не смейте указывать мне, что делать. Ваш Лорд-капитан потребовал объяснений".

traits.locale_text: {n}Your words have the opposite effect. His augmented joints tremble as he speaks:{/n} "Do not presume to tell me what to do. Your Lord Captain demanded an explanation."
{n}Your words have the opposite effect. His augmented joints tremble as he speaks:{/n} "Do not presume to tell me what to do. Your Lord Captain demanded an explanation."
{n}Your words have the opposite effect. His augmented joints tremble as he speaks,{/n} "Do not presume to tell me what to do. Your Lord Captain demanded an explanation."
{n}Your words have the opposite effect. His augmented joints tremble as he speaks,{/n} "Do not presume to tell me what to do. Your Lord Captain demanded an explanation."

languages.text: {n}Deine Worte bewirken das genaue Gegenteil. Seine augmentierten Gelenke zittern, als er spricht:{/n} "Wagt es nicht, mir zu sagen, was ich zu tun habe. Euer Lord Captain verlangt eine Erklärung."
languages.original_text: {n}Your words have the opposite effect. His augmented joints tremble as he speaks,{/n} "Do not presume to tell me what to do. Your Lord Captain demanded an explanation."

traits.locale_text: {n}Deine Worte bewirken das genaue Gegenteil. Seine augmentierten Gelenke zittern, als er spricht:{/n} "Wagt es nicht, mir zu sagen, was ich zu tun habe. Euer Lord Captain verlangt eine Erklärung."

languages.text: {n}Vos paroles n'ont pas l'effet escompté, et ses articulations augmentées tremblent tandis qu'il prend la parole :{/n} « Je ne vous autorise pas à me donner des ordres. Votre seigneur-capitaine a exigé une explication. »
languages.original_text: {n}Your words have the opposite effect. His augmented joints tremble as he speaks,{/n} "Do not presume to tell me what to do. Your Lord Captain demanded an explanation."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vos paroles n'ont pas l'effet escompté, et ses articulations augmentées tremblent tandis qu'il prend la parole :{/n} « Je ne vous autorise pas à me donner des ordres. Votre seigneur-capitaine a exigé une explication. »

languages.text: {n}Tus palabras tienen el efecto contrario. Sus articulaciones aumentadas tiemblan mientras habla:{/n} «No se atreva a decirle a su Lord Capitán qué hacer. He exigido una explicación».
languages.original_text: {n}Your words have the opposite effect. His augmented joints tremble as he speaks,{/n} "Do not presume to tell me what to do. Your Lord Captain demanded an explanation."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tus palabras tienen el efecto contrario. Sus articulaciones aumentadas tiemblan mientras habla:{/n} «No se atreva a decirle a su Lord Capitán qué hacer. He exigido una explicación».

languages.text: {n}Sözlerinin tam tersi bir etkisi oluyor. Konuşurken ogmentli eklemleri titriyor.{/n} "Bana ne yapacağımı söylemeye cüret etme. Lord Kaptan'ın açıklama talep etti."
languages.original_text: {n}Your words have the opposite effect. His augmented joints tremble as he speaks,{/n} "Do not presume to tell me what to do. Your Lord Captain demanded an explanation."

traits.locale_text: {n}Sözlerinin tam tersi bir etkisi oluyor. Konuşurken ogmentli eklemleri titriyor.{/n} "Bana ne yapacağımı söylemeye cüret etme. Lord Kaptan'ın açıklama talep etti."

languages.text: {n}你的话反而起了反效果。他开口时，植入物关节都在发抖：{/n}“别以为你能指挥我。你的舰长大人需要一个解释。”
languages.original_text: {n}Your words have the opposite effect. His augmented joints tremble as he speaks,{/n} "Do not presume to tell me what to do. Your Lord Captain demanded an explanation."

traits.locale_text: {n}你的话反而起了反效果。他开口时，植入物关节都在发抖：{/n}“别以为你能指挥我。你的舰长大人需要一个解释。”

languages.text: {n}君の言葉は逆の効果をもたらす。彼は語りながら、強化された関節を震わせる。{/n}「何をすべきかなど、差し出がましく指図するな。貴様の主たるロード・キャプテンが説明を求めたのだ。」
languages.original_text: {n}Your words have the opposite effect. His augmented joints tremble as he speaks,{/n} "Do not presume to tell me what to do. Your Lord Captain demanded an explanation."

traits.locale_text: {n}君の言葉は逆の効果をもたらす。彼は語りながら、強化された関節を震わせる。{/n}「何をすべきかなど、差し出がましく指図するな。貴様の主たるロード・キャプテンが説明を求めたのだ。」
